page.title: Email Search
page.description: Find which mail providers a username is registered at, using mailcat.

settings.title: Email Search Settings
settings.description: Configure how mailcat checks mail providers when searching for a username.
settings.maxConcurrencyHelp: Maximum number of providers checked in parallel
settings.proxyUrlHelp: Optional proxy used for provider checks (e.g. socks5://127.0.0.1:9050)
settings.useTorDescription: Route provider checks through a local Tor SOCKS5 proxy (127.0.0.1:9050), instead of a direct connection
settings.enableSmtpChecksDescription: Enable SMTP-based checks (Gmail, Yandex, mail.de) - these need outbound TCP/25, usually blocked unless routed via Tor or a proxy
settings.enableHeadlessChecksDescription: Enable headless-Chromium-based checks (Fastmail, int.pl, onet.pl) - downloads a Chromium binary on first use
settings.versionNeverChecked: PyPI has not been checked for a newer version yet
settings.updateRequiresRebuild: mailcat-osint is installed from PyPI - installing a newer version requires rebuilding the backend container, this only checks what's available
